scenarios.detail: Capture one sanitized valuable fixture and prove one durable event, exact projection delta, and one outbox enqueue in the same recoverable boundary.
Run an unchanged interval and prove zero history reads, event rewrites, repricing/enrichment visits, and overlapping jobs.
Race two collector starts and prove one listener, no candidate restart request, and an unchanged owner record.
Prove Codex OTLP capture only enqueues compact dirty work, later context repairs prior usage in fixed crash-resumable slices, and unchanged reruns visit zero rows.
Place deterministic poison before valid rows and prove one quarantine, no evidence rewrites, and later valid acknowledgement.
Read one coherent five-surface snapshot from projections with no raw-history or filesystem scan and warm p95 at or below 500ms.
Search database, upload body, logs, and receipt for raw-content sentinels after the integrated path runs.
